title: Merge Sort
code:
let rec merge_sort = function
  | [] -> []
  | [x] -> [x]
  | xs ->
    let mid = List.length xs / 2 in
    let left, right = List.filteri (fun i _ -> i < mid) xs,
                      List.filteri (fun i _ -> i >= mid) xs in
    merge (merge_sort left) (merge_sort right)

and merge l1 l2 =
  match l1, l2 with
  | [], ys -> ys
  | xs, [] -> xs
  | x :: xs, y :: ys ->
    if x <= y
    then x :: merge xs (y :: ys)
    else y :: merge (x :: xs) ys
description: Recursive merge sort using `function` for direct pattern matching on the argument. `List.filteri` splits at the midpoint, and a mutually recursive `merge` combines sorted halves. Idiomatic OCaml with `and` for mutual recursion.
